name: mollie
description: Access Mollie payments, customers, and refunds to monitor and operate payment flows

envVars.name: MOLLIE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Mollie API key (starts with live_ for production or test_ for test mode)

tools.name: List Payments
tools.description: List Mollie payments in reverse chronological order to review recent transactions

from.description: Pagination offset: payment ID (tr_...) to start the result set from

sort.description: Sort order by creation date: asc or desc (default desc)

tools.name: Get Payment
tools.description: Retrieve a single Mollie payment with its current status and details

embed.description: Comma-separated related resources to embed, such as refunds or chargebacks

tools.name: Create Payment
tools.description: Create a Mollie payment and get a checkout URL to send to the customer

amount.description: Amount object with currency (ISO 4217 code) and value as a string with exact decimals, e.g. {"currency": "EUR", "value": "10.00"}

description.description: Payment description shown on the customer's statement where possible (max 255 characters)

redirectUrl.description: URL the customer is redirected to after completing the payment

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL Mollie calls with payment status changes

method.description: Specific payment method to use, such as ideal, creditcard, or paypal; omit to let the customer choose

customerId.description: Mollie customer ID (cst_...) to attach the payment to

metadata.description: Custom metadata stored with the payment (about 1 kB max)

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List Mollie customers to find customer IDs for payments or refund context

from.description: Pagination offset: customer ID (cst_...) to start the result set from

tools.name: List Payment Methods
tools.description: List the payment methods enabled on your Mollie profile, e.g. to pick a valid method for a new payment

sequenceType.description: Filter methods by payment sequence: oneoff, first, or recurring

locale.description: Locale used to order methods by country preference and translate names, e.g. nl_NL

include.description: Additional data to include, e.g. issuers for iDEAL banks

tools.name: Create Payment Link
tools.description: Create a shareable hosted payment link the customer can open to pay, without building a checkout

description.description: Short description of the payment link, visible in the Dashboard (max 255 characters)

amount.description: Fixed amount with currency and value as a string, e.g. {"currency": "EUR", "value": "25.00"}; omit to let the customer enter an amount

redirectUrl.description: URL the customer is redirected to after completing the payment

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL Mollie calls with payment status changes

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the link expires; omit to keep it valid indefinitely

reusable.description: Whether the link can be paid multiple times (defaults to false: a single payment)

tools.name: List Payment Refunds
tools.description: List the refunds created for a payment to review refund status and history

paymentId.description: Mollie payment ID (tr_...) whose refunds to list

from.description: Pagination offset: refund ID (re_...) to start the result set from

tools.name: Create Refund
tools.description: Refund all or part of a Mollie payment back to the customer

amount.description: Amount to refund with currency and value as a string, e.g. {"currency": "EUR", "value": "5.00"}

description.description: Refund description that may be shown to the customer (max 255 characters)

metadata.description: Custom metadata stored with the refund

prompts.title: Recent payments
prompts.prompt: List my most recent Mollie payments and summarize their statuses and amounts.

prompts.title: Check payment status
prompts.prompt: Look up a Mollie payment by ID and tell me its current status, amount, and method.

prompts.title: Issue a refund
prompts.prompt: Refund a Mollie payment: confirm the payment details with me first, then create the refund.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Mollie setup

steps.title: Create a Mollie account
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.mollie.com. You can use test mode immediately after signup, before your account is fully activated for live payments.

steps.title: Get your API key
steps.description: In the Mollie Dashboard, go to Developers > API keys. Each website profile has a paired test key (test_...) and live key (live_...). Copy the key right away; treat it as a secret.

steps.title: Configure the environment variable
steps.description: Set MOLLIE_API_KEY to your test_ key while developing. Payments made with a test_ key are simulated and never charge real money. Switch to your live_ key once your account is approved for live payments.

notes: Test mode and live mode are selected by the key prefix: test_ keys hit the same https://api.mollie.com/v2 endpoints but operate on simulated data.
Amounts are strings with the exact number of decimals for the currency, e.g. "10.00" for EUR.
Set a webhookUrl on payments in production so you receive status changes; polling get_payment also works for agent workflows.
